name: @m2015agg/context7-skill
description: Local documentation cache for AI agents. Caches Context7 library docs in SQLite+FTS5, serving them via CLI instead of burning context on MCP round-trips.

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "process.stdout.write('
  context7-skill installed! Run: context7-skill install

')"

author: m2015agg <matthgreen2015@gmail.com>
